occurrence_sentence: Rigetti announced the roll out its fourth-generation Ankaa-1 system.
The company also calls out its continuing collaboration with Riverlane.
The company also calls out its continuing collaboration with Riverlane.
Riverlane has been tapped as inaugural collaborator using the Ankaa-1 system.

"After having launched the Ankaa-1 system internally, we are excited to have our longtime partner, Riverlane, as the first external partner using the system to work on improving error correction techniques on our new architecture,"

occurrence_sentence: Riverlane has been tapped as inaugural collaborator using the Ankaa-1 system.

"After having launched the Ankaa-1 system internally, we are excited to have our longtime partner, Riverlane, as the first external partner using the system to work on improving error correction techniques on our new architecture," Subodh Kulkarni, Rigetti Chief Executive Officer, said in [an announcement](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/rigetti-computing-reports-second-quarter-200500503.html?guccounter=1&guce_referrer=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS8&guce_referrer_sig=AQAAALk1DlJk-WxeEQSz-0m1ipIeIagVpYFGpwQhDPscyFeS7h_QKH-PL5ID6IXG9h3QTAPGTv4-fwefhNUfm1HGkUIcan14KFAtBNjg9wQAOcrIv521FohfpUJOF13a-6Ah9HrV9T9JD9-fi50ELisHJmqs118zuNO1a6gf6e59ZO2b).
Their early efforts with the Ankaa-1 system leverage Riverlane's quantum error correction expertise.

interaction_phrase: the first Ankaa-1 system external users
occurrence_sentence: "We are excited to be the first Ankaa-1 system external users. This project enables us to target real-time error correction decoding with our algorithms on Rigetti's FPGA hardware, which we hope will help improve performance on future systems."
